title: Mining Bot
description: MiningBot is a Minecraft Paper plugin that adds craftable AI mining companions. These floating bots follow players around and automatically mine visible ores!
body:
🤖 MiningBot Plugin ⛏️✨

Bring mining to the future with craftable AI companions! These floating bots follow you around and automatically mine visible ores — making resource gathering smarter and less tedious.

🔍 Quick Overview

🧪 Crafting: 8x Redstone Dust + 1x Amethyst Shard (shapeless)

📦 Inventory: 27 slots

🛠️ Controls:

👉 Right-click = spawn/access inventory

👊 Left-click = recall bot

🧠 Smart Mining: Mines only ores exposed to air (caves & surfaces)

📝 How to Create

Collect 8 Redstone Dust + 1 Amethyst Shard

Craft them together by putting the Amethyst Shard in the middle surrounded by Redstone Dust

Right-click the crafted item to spawn your bot

Watch as it follows you and mines nearby visible ores automatically!

⚡ Perfect for reducing grind while keeping gameplay balanced!

For support or inquiries, message me on discord:
procurer
